findings.description: PascalCase class names `ProjectId` and `Project` appear in the code examples but are absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source code uses `DeferredEntityList<ProjectId>`, `UniversalDao.defer().findAllBySqlFile(ProjectId.class, ...)`, and `UniversalDao.findBySqlFile(Project.class, ...)` — both are domain-level class names referenced in the implementation pattern.
